eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 02:22 AM ON MAY 23, 2026 Effective until 08:22 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: We interrupt this program to bring you this important announcement. This is an emergency missing child alert, or Levis Call, the Georgia version of an Amber Alert. The City of Atlanta  Police Department and the and the GEORGIA BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION are looking for a 2015 Grey Jeep, with GEORGIA TAG, AAT 6FJ. On May  22, 2026, TYSHAWN KEYS  an 8 YEAR OLD, Black MALE with BLACK HAIR and BROWN EYES, was last seen wearing a Black Shirt, Black Shorts and Black Air ForceOnes an SAMYIA KEYS a 9 Year Old  Female was last seen wearing a Black, White,Grey Sweatshirt, Burgundy Pants and Black and Yellow Jordans. He or she was abducted by Bernice Ann Keys, a 33 year old black female 56 tall weighing 150 pounds with Brown eye color and was last seen wearing Yellow pants and blue T-shirt. They were last seen at 406 Carey Drive SE, Atlanta I-85 South towards I-10.  is believed to be in extreme danger. If you have any information on the whereabouts of TYSHAWN and SAMYIA KEYS or the 2015 Grey Jeep, with GEORGIA TAG, AAT 6FJ, please dial 911. The public can also provide information to the GBI tip line at 1-800-597-TIPS or the See Send app for smartphone users.
